title: Receipt intake
description: Inbound door: a citizen submits an expense receipt for reimbursement.

returns.name: submit_claim
returns.description: A new expense reimbursement claim carrying a receipt image and claimant identity.

fields.name: claimant_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the citizen submitting the claim.

fields.name: receipt_image
fields.description: Receipt scan or photo (JPEG / PNG / PDF).

fields.name: lang
fields.description: Declared language of the receipt (ar / en / mixed). Optional — Fanar detects it.
